problem id: cd17f040
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  11010011 -> 00100000
  01111010 -> 01000000
  10111000 -> 00000000
  10001011 -> 00000000
  11011000 -> 00000000
  11100000 -> 00000000
  00110110 -> 01000000
  10100100 -> 00000000
  00111111 -> 01100000
  01001111 -> 10000000

query: 00000101
predicted answer: 00000000
